data.raceComments: {"comment":"4. MASTER OF WAR improved on his ninth of 11 two runs back last time out when after racing on the speed to the turn fought on well to the line to finish a long neck second of six over 1600m at Gosford when sent out at long odds. He drops 1.5kg in weight and looks well placed to go one better. 6. COOL SUMMER NIGHTS has placed in all three of her runs this prep, including last time out as the hot favourite finishing second of nine over 1500m at Port Macquarie after racing midfield for most of the trip. Has drawn a wide gate but with luck in the running should be fighting out the finish. 7. SUN TO ME fought on strongly when finishing a neck third over 1350m here last start. Racing over a longer trip is well worth an each-way ticket. 3. KHARIF wasn't far away on debut last start over 1280m at Muswellbrook, finishing fifth and beaten 2.5 lengths. Improver worth including.","runners":[4,6,7,3],"exclusive":true}
